metadata.title: Calendar
metadata.description: Calendar view of your daily notes

regex.source: Notice("Failed to read the daily note template")
text: "⚠️ Daily Notes plugin not enabled"
text: "The calendar is best used in conjunction with either the Daily Notes plugin or the Periodic Notes plugin (available in the Community Plugins catalog)."
regex.target: text: "日历插件最好与日记插件或 Periodic Notes 插件（可在第三方插件中找到）结合使用。"

regex.source: text: "Note: Weekly Note settings are moving. You are encouraged to install the 'Periodic Notes' plugin to keep the functionality in the future."
regex.target: text: "注意：“每周笔记 ”设置正在移动。我们建议您安装 “Periodic Notes ”插件，以便将来保留该功能。"
.setName("每个点表示的字数（即统计日记的字数）")

regex.source: .setDesc("How many words should be represented by a single dot?")
.setDesc("Choose what day of the week to start. Select 'Locale default' to use the default specified by moment.js")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择每周的起始日。选择“本地默认”以使用 moment.js 指定的默认值。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Show a confirmation modal before creating a new note")
regex.target: .setDesc("在创建新笔记前显示确认对话框")

regex.source: .setDesc("Enable this to add a column with the week number")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用此选项以添加一周编号列")

regex.source: .setDesc("For more syntax help, refer to format reference")
regex.target: .setDesc("如需更多语法帮助，请参阅格式参考。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose the file you want to use as the template for your weekly notes")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择要作为每周笔记模板的文件")

regex.source: .setDesc("New weekly notes will be placed here")
.setDesc("Set this if you want to use a locale different from the default")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果你想使用默认语言以外的语言，请设置此选项")

regex.source: .log("[Calendar] Failed to find daily notes folder", err)
regex.target: .log("[Calendar] 找不到每日笔记文件夹", err)

regex.source: .log("[Calendar] Failed to find weekly notes folder", err)
regex.target: .log("[Calendar] 找不到每周笔记文件夹", err)

regex.source: .error(`Failed to read the daily note template '${templatePath}'`, err)
text: `File ${filename} does not exist. Would you like to create it?`
regex.target: text: `文件 ${filename} 不存在。您想创建它吗？`
